SourceProxy.name: SHYXSelectionPlaneClipper
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Selection Plane Clipper

Documentation.short_help: Clip mesh with a plane from selection centroid and average normal.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Port 0 input is the full triangulated surface; port 0 output is the clipped mesh. Port 1 is a vtkSelection (same convention as SHYX Selection Extrude and VESPA Region Fairing): use Copy Active Selection in the Properties panel—no separate Extract Selection filter is required. The filter runs vtkExtractSelection internally, computes an area-weighted centroid and average face normal on the selected triangles, then clips the full mesh. With Tip connectivity (default), clipping follows the same strategy as SHYX Vessel End Clipper. Optional Selection Cell Array Name selects triangles on port 0 when no selection is provided. Fill Holes (default ON) runs vtkFillHolesFilter on the clip boundary using an automatic maximum hole size from the result bounds unless you set Fill Holes Maximum Size. Cell data from the clipped surface is restored after filling. New fill-hole triangles are stamped on the cell array named Fill Hole Stamp Array Name (default EndpointIndex). By default the marker is max(existing values)+1; enable Use Custom Marker Value to supply an explicit number instead. Other cell arrays copy tuple from cell 0.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Active selection (cells or points on Input). Use Copy Active Selection in the panel.

StringVectorProperty.name: SelectionCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Selection Cell Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: If Selection is empty: name of a cell data array on Input. Triangles are selected when value is greater than 0.5 (float) or non-zero (integer types), same as SHYX Selection Extrude.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ClipOffset
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Clip Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Shift the plane origin along the averaged normal from the patch centroid.

IntVectorProperty.name: InvertPlane
IntVectorProperty.label: Invert Plane Normal
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Flip the averaged normal (and half-space labels) before clipping.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseTipConnectivity
IntVectorProperty.label: Tip Connectivity (Vessel End Clipper style)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), split the mesh by the plane and remove the smaller connected fragment near the selection centroid. When OFF, remove a single half-space controlled by Remove Positive Half-Space.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemovePositiveHalfSpace
IntVectorProperty.label: Remove Positive Half-Space
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Only when Tip Connectivity is OFF: if ON, delete the side where the plane implicit function is positive; if OFF, delete the negative side.

IntVectorProperty.name: FillHoles
IntVectorProperty.label: Fill Holes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON (default), triangulate small open boundary loops after clipping (vtkFillHolesFilter), suitable for closing a planar cut. Turn OFF to keep the clip as an open surface.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FillHolesMaximumSize
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Fill Holes Maximum Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum boundary edge length considered for filling (vtkFillHolesFilter hole size). Zero (default) selects automatically from the clipped mesh bounding diagonal (about 35 percent).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseCustomFillHoleMarkerValue
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Custom Marker Value
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When OFF (default), new fill-hole triangles receive max(existing values)+1 automatically, or 1 when the stamp array does not yet exist. When ON, Fill Hole New Cell Marker Value is used instead.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FillHoleNewCellDataMarkerValue
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Fill Hole New Cell Marker Value
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Explicit marker written on each new fill-hole triangle when Use Custom Marker Value is ON.

StringVectorProperty.name: FillHoleStampCellArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Fill Hole Stamp Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the cell array that marks new fill-hole triangles. If the array already exists before filling, it is reused and new triangles receive max(existing)+1 (or the custom marker when Use Custom Marker Value is ON). If the array does not exist, a new vtkDoubleArray is created (pre-fill cells = 0, new cells = 1 or custom marker). Empty string falls back to EndpointIndex.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseInteractiveCutPlanes
IntVectorProperty.label: Show Interactive Cut Plane
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON, the yellow plane widget is shown so you can edit the cut plane in the view. Turning it OFF only hides the widget; clipping still uses the last plane from the widget (InteractiveCutPacked) when present. Apply once so port 0 is generated, then drag the plane and Apply again to clip.

StringVectorProperty.name: InteractiveCutPacked
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Internal: six doubles (origin xyz, direction-handle xyz) for the implicit plane widget.
